chapter_title.ar: باب عِدَّةِ أُمَّهَاتِ الْأَوْلَادِ وَ الرَّجُلِ يُعْتِقُ إِحْدَاهُنَّ أَوْ يَمُوتُ عَنْهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 78 – Waiting period of the mothers of the children, and the man who emancipates one of them, or he dies from her

text: عَلِيٌّ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ جَمِيلِ بْنِ دَرَّاجٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ قَالَ فِي رَجُلٍ أَعْتَقَ أُمَّ وَلَدِهِ ثُمَّ تُوُفِّيَ عَنْهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ تَنْقَضِيَ عِدَّتُهَا قَالَ تَعْتَدُّ بِأَرْبَعَةِ أَشْهُرٍ وَ عَشْرٍ وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ حُبْلَى اعْتَدَّتْ بِأَبْعَدِ الْأَجَلَيْنِ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel Bin Darraj, from one of his companions,

‘He<sup>asws</sup> said regarding a man who emancipated a mother of his children, then died from her before she had fulfilled her waiting period. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘She would observe the waiting period of four months and ten (days), and if she was pregnant, she would wait with the further of the two terms’.
